dk.energinet.energidataservice.PowerSyst.name: PowerSystemSnapshot
dk.energinet.energidataservice.PowerSyst.description: Minute-by-minute snapshot of the Danish power system from Energi Data Service (Energinet), including CO2 emission intensity, renewable generation (solar, onshore wind, offshore wind), conventional production bands, total cross-border exchange flows, per-interconnector exchange (DK1–DE, DK1–NL, DK1–GB, DK1–NO, DK1–SE, DK1–DK2, DK2–DE, DK2–SE, Bornholm–SE), automatic and manual frequency restoration reserve activation (aFRR, mFRR) per price area, and grid imbalance per price area.

dk.energinet.energidataservice.SpotPrice.name: SpotPrice
dk.energinet.energidataservice.SpotPrice.description: Day-ahead electricity spot price per bidding zone from Energi Data Service (Energinet / Nord Pool). One record per hour per price area (DK1 – Western Denmark, DK2 – Eastern Denmark). Prices are published in both DKK and EUR.

dk.energinet.energidataservice.Info.name: Info
dk.energinet.energidataservice.Info.description: Retained reference information for MQTT/AMQP topic discovery.

dk.energinet.energidataservice.mqtt.description: MQTT 5.0 binary-mode CloudEvents variant of dk.energinet.energidataservice.

dk.energinet.energidataservice.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 binary-mode CloudEvents variant of dk.energinet.energidataservice.

subject.description: AMQP subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

x-opt-partition-key.description: AMQP partition key matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

subject.description: AMQP subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

x-opt-partition-key.description: AMQP partition key matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

subject.description: AMQP subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

x-opt-partition-key.description: AMQP partition key matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

PowerSystemSnapshot.name: PowerSystemSnapshot
PowerSystemSnapshot.description: Minute-by-minute snapshot of the Danish power system from Energi Data Service (Energinet). Published by the PowerSystemRightNow dataset at approximately 1-minute intervals.

minutes1_utc.description: UTC timestamp of the snapshot rounded to the nearest minute, in ISO 8601 format. Sourced from the PowerSystemRightNow 'Minutes1UTC' field.

minutes1_dk.description: Danish local-time timestamp of the snapshot rounded to the nearest minute, in ISO 8601 format. Sourced from the PowerSystemRightNow 'Minutes1DK' field.

price_area.description: Price area code. Set to 'DK' for system-wide power system snapshots that cover the entire Danish grid (both DK1 and DK2).

co2_emission.description: CO2 emission intensity of electricity consumed in Denmark at the time of the snapshot, measured in grams of CO2 per kWh (g/kWh). Sourced from 'CO2Emission'.

production_ge_100mw.description: Total electricity production from centralized power plants with capacity >= 100 MW, in megawatts (MW). Sourced from 'ProductionGe100MW'.

production_lt_100mw.description: Total electricity production from decentralized power plants with capacity < 100 MW, in megawatts (MW). Sourced from 'ProductionLt100MW'.

solar_power.description: Estimated total solar photovoltaic power production in Denmark, in megawatts (MW). Sourced from 'SolarPower'.

offshore_wind_power.description: Total offshore wind power production in Denmark, in megawatts (MW). Sourced from 'OffshoreWindPower'.

onshore_wind_power.description: Total onshore wind power production in Denmark, in megawatts (MW). Sourced from 'OnshoreWindPower'.

exchange_sum.description: Net total cross-border electricity exchange for all Danish interconnectors, in megawatts (MW). Positive values indicate net import; negative values indicate net export. Sourced from 'Exchange_Sum'.

exchange_dk1_de.description: Electricity exchange flow on the DK1–Germany interconnector, in megawatts (MW). Positive = import to DK1, negative = export from DK1. Sourced from 'Exchange_DK1_DE'.

exchange_dk1_nl.description: Electricity exchange flow on the DK1–Netherlands (COBRAcable) interconnector, in megawatts (MW). Positive = import to DK1, negative = export from DK1. Sourced from 'Exchange_DK1_NL'.

exchange_dk1_gb.description: Electricity exchange flow on the DK1–Great Britain (Viking Link) interconnector, in megawatts (MW). Positive = import to DK1, negative = export from DK1. Sourced from 'Exchange_DK1_GB'.

exchange_dk1_no.description: Electricity exchange flow on the DK1–Norway (Skagerrak) interconnector, in megawatts (MW). Positive = import to DK1, negative = export from DK1. Sourced from 'Exchange_DK1_NO'.

exchange_dk1_se.description: Electricity exchange flow on the DK1–Sweden interconnector, in megawatts (MW). Positive = import to DK1, negative = export from DK1. Sourced from 'Exchange_DK1_SE'.

exchange_dk1_dk2.description: Electricity exchange flow on the DK1–DK2 (Great Belt) interconnector, in megawatts (MW). Positive = flow from DK1 to DK2, negative = flow from DK2 to DK1. Sourced from 'Exchange_DK1_DK2'.

exchange_dk2_de.description: Electricity exchange flow on the DK2–Germany (Kontek) interconnector, in megawatts (MW). Positive = import to DK2, negative = export from DK2. Sourced from 'Exchange_DK2_DE'.

exchange_dk2_se.description: Electricity exchange flow on the DK2–Sweden (Øresund) interconnector, in megawatts (MW). Positive = import to DK2, negative = export from DK2. Sourced from 'Exchange_DK2_SE'.

exchange_bornholm_se.description: Electricity exchange flow on the Bornholm–Sweden interconnector, in megawatts (MW). Positive = import to Bornholm, negative = export from Bornholm. Sourced from 'Exchange_Bornholm_SE'.

afrr_activated_dk1.description: Automatic Frequency Restoration Reserve (aFRR) activated in price area DK1, in megawatts (MW). Positive = upward regulation, negative = downward regulation. Sourced from 'aFRR_ActivatedDK1'.

afrr_activated_dk2.description: Automatic Frequency Restoration Reserve (aFRR) activated in price area DK2, in megawatts (MW). Positive = upward regulation, negative = downward regulation. Sourced from 'aFRR_ActivatedDK2'.

mfrr_activated_dk1.description: Manual Frequency Restoration Reserve (mFRR) activated in price area DK1, in megawatts (MW). Positive = upward regulation, negative = downward regulation. Sourced from 'mFRR_ActivatedDK1'.

mfrr_activated_dk2.description: Manual Frequency Restoration Reserve (mFRR) activated in price area DK2, in megawatts (MW). Positive = upward regulation, negative = downward regulation. Sourced from 'mFRR_ActivatedDK2'.

imbalance_dk1.description: Net power imbalance in price area DK1, in megawatts (MW). Represents the difference between scheduled and actual generation/consumption. Sourced from 'ImbalanceDK1'.

imbalance_dk2.description: Net power imbalance in price area DK2, in megawatts (MW). Represents the difference between scheduled and actual generation/consumption. Sourced from 'ImbalanceDK2'.

SpotPrice.name: SpotPrice
SpotPrice.description: Day-ahead electricity spot price per bidding zone from Energi Data Service (Energinet / Nord Pool). One record per hour per price area.

hour_utc.description: UTC hour for which the spot price applies, in ISO 8601 format. Each price applies to the full 60-minute interval starting at this timestamp. Sourced from 'HourUTC'.

hour_dk.description: Danish local-time hour for which the spot price applies, in ISO 8601 format. Sourced from 'HourDK'.

price_area.description: Nord Pool bidding zone code. 'DK1' is Western Denmark (Jutland and Funen); 'DK2' is Eastern Denmark (Zealand, Lolland-Falster, and Bornholm). Sourced from 'PriceArea'.

spot_price_dkk.description: Day-ahead spot price in Danish Kroner per megawatt-hour (DKK/MWh). Sourced from 'SpotPriceDKK'.

spot_price_eur.description: Day-ahead spot price in Euros per megawatt-hour (EUR/MWh). Sourced from 'SpotPriceEUR'.

schema.name: Info
schema.description: Reference information for the source, area, or event collection used by MQTT retained topics and AMQP consumers to discover the logical feed scope.

info_id.description: Stable identifier for the reference information record; used as the CloudEvents subject when no more specific upstream entity exists.

name.description: Human-readable name for the source, area, or event collection represented by this reference information record.

country.description: Lower-case ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code or intl when the feed spans countries.

city.description: City segment used in civic-events topic routing, or null when not applicable.

category.description: Event category segment used in topic routing, or null when not applicable.

price_area.description: Energy market price area or bidding zone represented by this reference record, when applicable.

settlement_date.description: GB settlement date for Elexon retained information topics when applicable.

settlement_period.description: GB settlement period for Elexon retained information topics when applicable.

area_code.description: Electricity control area or utility service area code represented by this record when applicable.

segment.description: Ticketmaster classification segment used for wildcard topic routing, when applicable.

entity_id.description: Stable upstream entity identifier for reference topics, when applicable.

event_id.description: Stable upstream event identifier for event-scoped reference topics, when applicable.

venue_id.description: Stable venue identifier for venue-scoped civic event topics, when applicable.
